---
title: "Development Tools"
---

# Development Tools

::: {.callout-note title="Appendix Status"}
This appendix documents the tools and technologies used to build this book. These tools are not the focus of the book's content; they are documented here for transparency and for contributors who wish to reproduce or extend the work.
:::

## Tools Used

| Tool | Purpose |
|:---|:---|
| [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) | Reproducible document and book generation |
| [R](https://www.r-project.org/) / [RStudio](https://posit.co/products/open-source/rstudio/) | Data analysis, visualization, and Shiny dashboards |
| [Python](https://www.python.org/) | API access, data engineering, PDF extraction |
| [VS Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/) | Primary editor for development |
| [GitHub](https://github.com/) | Version control and publishing (GitHub Pages) |
| [GitHub Copilot](https://github.com/features/copilot) | AI-assisted development |
| [Mermaid](https://mermaid.js.org/) | Text-based diagrams for data flows and frameworks |
| [Tableau Public](https://public.tableau.com/) | Interactive dashboard publishing |

## Local Development

To build this book locally:

```bash
# Render the book
quarto render

# Preview with live reload
quarto preview
```
